title: Jonathan Shewchuk | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Jonathan Shewchuk | EECS at UC Berkeley Jonathan Shewchuk: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Jonathan Shewchuk Professor Contact Information 529 Soda Hall tel: 510-642-3936 fax: 510-642-3962 jrs@cs.berkeley.edu Links Personal Homepage Publications Dissertations Research Support Monica Naputi mnaputi@berkeley.edu Biography He obtained his B.Sc. in Physics and Computing Science from Simon Fraser University, 1990, and a M.S. and Ph.D. in Computer Science from Carnegie Mellon University, the latter in 1997. He joined the Computer Science Division of the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at UC Berkeley in 1998. Research Areas Scientific Computing (SCI) Theory (THY) Graphics (GR) Research Centers Visual Computing Lab (VCL) Teaching Schedule CS 274. Computational Geometry , MoWe 14:30-15:59, Soda 320 Selected Publications J. Shewchuk, " Unstructured Mesh Generation ," in Combinatorial Scientific Computing , Boca Raton, Florida: CRC Press, 2012, pp. 257--297. F. Hecht, Y. J. Lee, J. Shewchuk, and J. O'Brien, " Updated Sparse Cholesky Factors for Corotational Elastodynamics ," ACM Transactions on Graphics , vol. 31, no. 5, pp. X:1--13, Oct. 2012. J. Shewchuk, " General-dimensional constrained Delaunay triangulations and constrained regular triangulations I: Combinatorial properties ," Discrete & Computational Geometry , vol. 39, no. 1-3, pp. 580-637, March 2008. J. Shewchuk, " Star splaying: An algorithm for repairing Delaunay triangulations and convex hulls ," in Proc. 21st Annual Symp. on Computational Geometry , New York, NY: ACM Press, 2005, pp. 237-246. C. Shen, J. O'Brien, and J. Shewchuk, " Interpolating and approximating implicit surfaces from polygon soup ," ACM Trans. Graphics: Special Issue on the Proc. ACM SIGGRAPH 2004 , vol. 23, no. 3, pp. 896-904, Aug. 2004. F. Labelle and J. Shewchuk, " Anisotropic Voronoi diagrams and guaranteed-quality anisotropic mesh generation ," in Proc. 19th Annual Symp. on Computational Geometry , New York, NY: ACM Press, 2003, pp. 191-200. J. Shewchuk, " Triangle: Engineering a 2D quality mesh generator and Delaunay triangulator ," in Lecture Notes in Computer Science , M. C. Lin and D. Manocha, Eds., Vol. 1148, Berlin: Springer-Verlag, 1996, pp. 203-222. Selected Honors and Awards Diane S. McEntyre Award for Excellence in Teaching Computer Science , 2010 Jim and Donna Gray Award for Excellence in Undergraduate Teaching of Computer Science , 2006 Sloan Research Fellow , 2004 James H. Wilkinson Prize for Numerical Software , 2003 Okawa Research Grant , 1999 NSF Faculty Early Career Development Award (CAREER) , 1999
